/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/1-Flat.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/1-Flat.dir/1-Flat.cpp.o" -o 1-Flat  ../../faiss/libfaiss.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_intel_lp64.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_gnu_thread.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmkl_core.so -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
